caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white dress shirt, a bowtie, and suspenders, topped with a large, grey, conical wig and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items on hangers. The logo "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the left and right sides of the screen. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, and his facial expression shifts slightly as he talks. His head moves minimally, primarily tilting and nodding as he continues his conversation. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot of the man from the waist up throughout the scene.
